ns2:workflow.description: List VCFA/VRA machines that belong to a project selected by project name.

param.name: projectName
param.description: Project name to match exactly, case-insensitively.

param.name: vms
param.description: VM records for the matched project.

param.name: vmCount
param.description: Number of VMs matched for the project.

workflow-item.name: item1
workflow-item.description: Find machines by VCFA/VRA project name.
